message:
fix(node): replace unreachable panic!() with diagnostic messages in 3 modules

Replaces bare panic!() calls with unreachable!() that include context
about what was expected vs received, making post-mortem debugging
possible when these theoretically-unreachable paths are hit:

- n_version_oracle.rs: panic → unreachable with variant description
- hardware_planner.rs: panic → unreachable with actual value in msg
- intent_firewall.rs: panic → unreachable with match arm context

These are all in match arms that should never execute given prior
validation, but if they do, the error message now aids diagnosis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
